org.jline.widget.TailTipWidgets.TipType

Package
Description
org.jline.widget
JLine Widget package provides a framework for creating and managing widgets for JLine's LineReader.

    TailTipWidgets(LineReader reader, Function<CmdLine,CmdDesc> descFun, int descriptionSize, TailTipWidgets.TipType tipType)
    Creates tailtip widgets used in command line suggestions.
     
    TailTipWidgets(LineReader reader, Map<String,CmdDesc> tailTips, int descriptionSize, TailTipWidgets.TipType tipType)
    Creates tailtip widgets used in command line suggestions with a status bar and specific tip type.
